title: Holy End of Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Holy End of Evangelion             Quote Post by scarmullet » Mon Sep 14, 2009 3:10 am Out of bordom a while back I did something called "Komm Susser Tod Substitutes". One of which was "Holy Diver" and I was surpirsed at how well it synced. Well I put the entire "Holy Diver" album to EoE and it syncs up surprisingly well. Here is how you do it, start playing the album at track 7 (Invisible) at 47:23 on the film. Track 7; Invisible: 47:57; "If your circle stays unbroken" shows Eva 02 destroyed. 49:24; "A Lady and a man", shows two dead NERV personel, one looking like a woman. 49: 38; "It sounded dark", Unit 01s eyes go dark. 52:00; "we need a helping hand" Gendo's hand is in Rei's stomach Track 8; Rainbow in the dark (52:49): 53:27; "Dancing in the light" the Energy observation graph starts to activate 54:08; "is it someone that you know" Shinji starts crying for Misato 54:33; the tempo picks up when Rei/liliths head starts to lift 56:05; "look out!" plays as Koworu/Lilith appears Track 9; Shame on the Night (57:03): 57:48; The bass drum hits when the swing crosses the sun 59:43; When the swing hits its highest position on the left, a high note on the guitar is hit. 1:01:20; "shame on you!", Shinji watching Misato and Kaji having sex. Track 1; Stand up and Shout (1:02:22): The Tempo of the song fits the chaos that goes on through most of it 1:03:37; it looks as if Shinji is reciting the lyrics to the distraught Asuka at the table. 1:04:43; again it looks as if Shinji is reciting the lyrics but pissed off Track 2; Holy Diver (1:05:40): 1:06:57; the Brrrrr noise occurs when Rei/Lilith begins to emerge from the planet 1:07:25; "You've been down too long in the midnight sea". The moon is directly above Rei/lilith's anti-at field which looks like water resonating from her. 1:08:00; "Like the Eyes of a cat", Misato's eyes glistening like diamonds when she kisses the guy. 1:08:03; "Something is Comming for you." The mass of Rei's coming to release the guys AT field. 1:08:36. "the Vision never dies" the Seele monoliths start to disapear. Track 3; Gypsy (1:11:35) "Next time"

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Mon Sep 14, 2009 3:32 pm Awesome! Considering my username, I have to try this.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 14, 2009 9:20 pm Sounds interesting. Thanks for the info.

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Mon Sep 14, 2009 9:22 pm yeah i might do this just for the lulz some time when i'm bored

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Mon Sep 14, 2009 9:35 pm If someone could compile references for the first part of the movie using the same guide. Place 7 at (47:23), and put 6 before it, then 5, then 4, etc.

[]:             Quote Post by cambaprecoz » Mon Sep 14, 2009 9:56 pm Someone be a nice fellow and make it a video on youtube.

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Sun Oct 25, 2009 4:16 pm Sorry for the long wait but Holy end of Evangelion on Blip.tv [/url]
